steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The first sentence gives a known use of quipus: recording countable information. The second sentence adds a possible further use: recording more complex information such as stories and myths.

steps.title: Reject false relationships
steps.content: A signals a result, but the possible complex use does not follow as an effect of the countable use. B restates or clarifies, which does not fit. D gives an example, but the sentence adds another use. The answer is C.
